allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\(''rfp_agent.db''\); cursor = conn.cursor\(\); cursor.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(conversations\)''\); print\([col for col in cursor.fetchall\(\)]\); conn.close\(\)")

Bash(python -c "from app.services.chat_memory import get_chat_history, get_all_sessions; h = get_chat_history\(''stream-session''\); print\(''History for stream-session:'', len\(h\), ''messages''\); s = get_all_sessions\(\); print\(''Sessions:'', len\(s\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from app.services.chat_memory import get_all_sessions; s = get_all_sessions\(\); print\(''Sessions:'', len\(s\)\); [print\('' '', x\) for x in s[:5]]")
